commands.description: Get OS version, build, and system time from memory dump
Identify OS from memory dump (works for Linux too)
Display environment variables per process
List running processes (EPROCESS linked list)
Scan for processes including hidden/unlinked ones
Display process tree with parent-child relationships
Show command-line arguments for each process
List handles (files, registry keys, mutexes) for a process
List DLLs loaded by a specific process
Dump full memory of a specific process
Extract files from process memory (DLLs, EXEs)
Scan for FILE_OBJECT structures in memory
Dump a specific file by virtual address from filescan
List network connections and listening sockets
Show active network connections (similar to netstat)
Extract password hashes from SAM (requires SYSTEM hive)
Extract LSA secrets (cached credentials, service passwords)
Find injected code in process memory (RWX pages)
Check System Service Descriptor Table for hooks
List loaded kernel modules
List kernel callbacks (rootkit detection)
Identify OS profile (critical first step in Vol2)
List processes with profile specified
Extract commands from cmd.exe (conhost/csrss)
Extract full console input/output history
Extract clipboard contents
Read specific registry key from memory
Extract TrueCrypt/VeraCrypt passphrase from memory
Quick string search for sensitive data
Extract all URLs from memory dump
Identify memory dump format (raw, ELF core, hibernation)
Hex dump first bytes to check file header/signature
